subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants nigh unto the celestial Threshold! Your letter hath been received, and concerning the wanderers of Sarvistan, a detailed letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده مقرب درگاه کبریا مکتوب شما رسید و بجهت آوارگان سروستان نامه مفصل
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters
